final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input enable,
  output reg [3:0] count_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    begin end  // redundant
    if (reset) begin
      count_out <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else if (enable) begin
      count_out <= count_out + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
